findings.root_cause: Manifest identity was not bound to the database actually opened; whole-label purge and publish ordering were incomplete.
positive_tests: private double reproduction: 136767 rows and 2779/2779 crossing labels purged
findings.dynamic_reproduction: Two isolated private runs produced identical Parquet/report/normalized-manifest hashes; opened DB hash exact; zero residue.
remaining_limitations: Canonical/public row-level evidence publication remains deliberately disabled; the double reproduction is ENGINEERING_SELF_CHECK only.
findings.semantic_review: ACCEPTED; database FD identity, true purge and atomic rollback independently reviewed.
findings.independent_acceptance: ACCEPTED at final head; CI 29187211346 3/3 success.

findings.root_cause: Test candidates/evidence could be combined with non-test ticket and ledger writes.
positive_tests: all test-only fixture paths remain usable without real writes
fixed report and ticket writes are atomically validated
findings.dynamic_reproduction: The original direct-library test-provenance path is rejected at runner and emitter layers before any ledger mutation.
remaining_limitations: A10 real ticket and ledger surfaces remain disabled by the remediation capability boundary.
findings.semantic_review: ACCEPTED; provenance enforcement and sink-layer rejection independently reviewed.
findings.independent_acceptance: ACCEPTED at final head; CI 29187211346 3/3 success.

findings.root_cause: Factor values were label-aligned after index reset and the final test omitted validated winners; experiment identities and winner bytes also lacked fail-closed lifecycle binding.
positive_tests: 79 full tests and 56 focused semantic tests
findings.dynamic_reproduction: Independent replay: old positional result 0/3 and repaired 3/3; winner is loaded before one frozen test trial and evaluated as best_factors; all identity attacks reject.
remaining_limitations: No old factor outcome was rerun or promoted.
findings.semantic_review: ACCEPTED after three adversarial review rounds; no material findings.

findings.root_cause: The strict loader required the available_at column name but not non-null, timezone, decision-time or revision safety.
positive_tests: 117 full tests and 97 PIT integration tests
findings.dynamic_reproduction: Unknown or unsafe availability fails strict PIT and cannot change the frozen negative adjudication.
remaining_limitations: US31/US36/US41/US46 remain rejected and cannot be rescued or rerun by infrastructure improvements.
findings.semantic_review: ACCEPTED; available_at and revision safety independently reviewed.

findings.root_cause: Top-level research-only prose did not accurately classify retained HITL/manual-fill surfaces.
positive_tests: capability matrix matches installed CLI and import paths
findings.dynamic_reproduction: Default research installation exposes no actionable A10/manual-fill command; retained code is disabled and separately classified.
remaining_limitations: Retained disabled code remains visible audit surface and requires separate authorization before any future activation.
findings.semantic_review: ACCEPTED with capability ADR and machine-readable matrix.

findings.root_cause: Path.resolve equality missed hardlink aliases and collectors wrote directly to predictable targets.
findings.dynamic_reproduction: Pre-fix hardlink truncated input; post-fix root-to-leaf descriptor validation and atomic publication preserve inputs and prior output under every replay.

findings.root_cause: Manifest structural validity could be mistaken for commands that were actually executed.
findings.dynamic_reproduction: A distinct execution task and acceptance task verified exact logs, streams, commands, executable, lock, commit and tree.

findings.root_cause: Configuration-derived CSV names could escape data_dir and conflicting duplicates were silently keep-last.
positive_tests: exact provenance file-set and identical-row deduplication
findings.dynamic_reproduction: Explicit table enum, containment and alias checks reject escape before read; conflicting observations fail closed.
findings.independent_acceptance: Exact-head CI 29186400784 3/3 success; final shadow verdict pending.

findings.root_cause: Family66 canonical output could use a data-byte-verification bypass without a distinct result identity.
positive_tests: canonical verification metadata required before output directory creation
findings.dynamic_reproduction: Canonical bypass is removed; diagnostic execution cannot impersonate canonical evidence.
remaining_limitations: Family66 remains rejected and was not rerun.
findings.independent_acceptance: CI 29186401179 exact head 3/3 success; final shadow verdict pending.

findings.root_cause: Critical integration checks could skip and Actions/dependencies were not uniformly immutable.
findings.dynamic_reproduction: Every repository has static-unit, integration-identity and controlled-fixture-reproduction success at the exact bound commit with zero unexpected skips.
findings.semantic_review: Required-run and SBOM indices are machine-readable and checksum-bound.

findings.root_cause: Shared briefs and manifests did not resolve through one immutable authoritative controller root.
findings.dynamic_reproduction: A pinned controller code-root branch separates executable validator identity from the later transport commit, avoiding self-referential commit claims.
remaining_limitations: This entry closes only when FINAL_CONTROLLER_ROOT.json and shadow report are committed, pushed and independently validated.
findings.semantic_review: Controller validators accepted; final package assembly pending.

findings.root_cause: Public row-level and binary artifacts lacked complete source, license and redistribution classification.
findings.dynamic_reproduction: All 22 unresolved artifacts are absent from final remediation refs; licensed CC0 fixtures are exact-hash governed.
remaining_limitations: Historical objects are preserved pending separate governance authority; no force-push/history rewrite was performed.
findings.semantic_review: Binary manifest and both repository policies reviewed.
findings.independent_acceptance: Current public remediation refs contain zero unclassified binary artifacts.

findings.root_cause: PBO integer blocks silently dropped a non-divisible remainder and omitted input/used/dropped counts.
positive_tests: divisible sample reports input=used and dropped=0
findings.dynamic_reproduction: Non-divisible samples reject; no observation is silently dropped.
findings.independent_acceptance: CI 29186401179 exact head 3/3 success; final shadow verdict pending.
